name: wxcode-admin-savory-pos
title: Service Admin
description: Warm light-mode service back-office aesthetic: near-white canvas (#faf8f5), amber accent (#f59e0b) with tomato alert tones (#ef4444) on white cards, dark sidebar (#1c1917) with grouped nav sections, 4 KPI tiles with inline sparklines, 3-column live state board, ranked items list with inline bars, area-fill SVG trend chart, and dense records table with status pills. Archetype = 240px grouped-nav sidebar + 60px sticky topbar + KPI tile row + state board + bottom 2-column grid + records table.

query.en: Apply this warm light-mode service admin aesthetic to my domain — dark sidebar with grouped nav, amber accent, 4 KPI tiles with sparklines, 3-column live state board, ranked items list with inline bars, area-fill trend chart, and dense records table with status pills, plus list, form, and detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个暖色调轻模式服务管理风格应用到我的领域：深色侧边栏、琥珀色强调色、4 个带迷你图的 KPI 卡片、3 列实时状态看板、带内联进度条的排名列表、面积趋势图和带状态标签的密集记录表格，以及列表、表单和详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
